LanguageData.AncientExostriderCannon.description: A heavy autocannon salvaged from a Vertibot wreck.
LanguageData.AncientExostriderCannon.label: Vertibot autocannon
LanguageData.AncientExostriderHead.description: The cockpit of a crashed Vertibot, filled with old controls and shattered glass.
LanguageData.AncientExostriderHead.label: Vertibot cockpit
LanguageData.AncientExostriderLeg.description: Landing gear from a Vertibot, twisted and scorched from the crash.
LanguageData.AncientExostriderLeg.label: Vertibot landing gear
LanguageData.AncientExostriderRemains.description: The remains of a Vertibot, a pre-war military transport aircraft. Scattered with pre-war tech.
LanguageData.AncientExostriderRemains.label: crashed Vertibot
LanguageData.Apparel_AirwireHeadset.description: A wearable antenna for interfacing with RobCo robots. Allows remote control and communication.
LanguageData.Apparel_AirwireHeadset.label: Pipboy Antenna
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetMechCommander.descrip: Helmet made out of Eyebot parts. Used for commanding RobCo robots.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetMechCommander.label: Eyebot Helmet
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetMechlordHelmet.descri: Helmet built after design documents of a powerful pre-war hero known as the Mechanist. Grants advanced control over RobCo robots.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetMechlordHelmet.label: Mechanist Helmet
LanguageData.Apparel_ArrayHeadset.description: An advanced headset for RobCo robot control, featuring improved bandwidth and reliability.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArrayHeadset.label: Pipboy Headset
LanguageData.Apparel_IntegratorHeadset.description: Direct neural interface for RobCo robots, enabling seamless control and feedback.
LanguageData.Apparel_IntegratorHeadset.label: Pipboy Brain Link
LanguageData.Apparel_MechlordSuit.description: Armor built after design documents of a powerful pre-war hero known as the Mechanist. Provides superior protection and robot command capabilities.
LanguageData.Apparel_MechlordSuit.label: Mechanist Armor
LanguageData.Apparel_PackBandwidth.description: Harddrive that expands the bandwidth for controlling multiple RobCo robots.
LanguageData.Apparel_PackBandwidth.label: Pipboy Bandwidth Harddrive
LanguageData.Apparel_PackControl.description: Harddrive containing control protocols for RobCo robots.
LanguageData.Apparel_PackControl.label: Pipboy Control Harddrive
LanguageData.BandNode.description: Node for managing RobCo robot control bands.
LanguageData.BandNode.label: RobCo band node
LanguageData.BasicRecharger.description: Civilian RobCo robots can recharge here. Produces and stores wastepacks internally.
LanguageData.BasicRecharger.label: Civilian RobCo Recharger
LanguageData.ControlSublink.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to expand control groups for RobCo robots. Insert into the Pipboy to upgrade your robot command capabilities.
LanguageData.ControlSublink.label: Pipboy Control Holotape
LanguageData.ControlSublinkHigh.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to expand control groups for RobCo robots beyond standard limits. Insert into the Pipboy to unlock high-tier robot command capabilities.
LanguageData.ControlSublinkHigh.label: Pipboy High-Tier Control Holotape
LanguageData.Defoliator.description: A RobCo device designed to clear vegetation. Emits hazardous energy.
LanguageData.LargeMechGestator.description: Device for assembling RobCo robots from components.
LanguageData.LargeMechGestator.label: Military RobCo Workbench
LanguageData.MechanoidTransponder.description: A pre-war transponder by RobCo Industries.
LanguageData.MechanoidTransponder.label: RobCo Transponder
LanguageData.MechAssembler.description: A RobCo device for assembling and repairing robots.
LanguageData.MechAssembler.label: RobCo robot assembler
LanguageData.MechBooster.description: A RobCo-branded remote energy and computation enhancement device. Any friendly RobCo robots in its effect radius will move and work faster, thanks to proprietary RobCo signal technology.
LanguageData.MechBooster.label: RobCo Booster
LanguageData.MechCapsule.description: A RobCo capsule for deploying robots. Contains pre-war robots ready for action.
LanguageData.MechCapsule.label: RobCo robot capsule
LanguageData.MechDropBeacon.description: A RobCo beacon for guiding robot drops.
LanguageData.MechDropBeacon.label: RobCo robot drop beacon
LanguageData.MechFormfeeder.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to optimize the crafting process for RobCo robots. Insert into the Pipboy to increase robot production speed.
LanguageData.MechFormfeeder.label: Pipboy Crafting Processor Holotape
LanguageData.MechGestator.description: Device for assembling RobCo robots from components.
LanguageData.MechGestator.label: Civilian RobCo Workbench
LanguageData.Mechlink.description: The Pipboy is a wrist-mounted device used to control RobCo robots. It provides remote access, status monitoring, and direct command capabilities for all RobCo robot units.
LanguageData.Mechlink.label: Pipboy
LanguageData.NanostructuringChip.description: The depletet remains of a Sentry Bot fusion cell.
LanguageData.NanostructuringChip.label: Depletet Sentry Bot Fusion Core
LanguageData.OrbitalTargeterMechCluster.description: A RobCo device for targeting orbital robot army deployments.
LanguageData.OrbitalTargeterMechCluster.label: RobCo orbital robot army targeter
LanguageData.PowerfocusChip.description: The severed head of a broken assaultron.
LanguageData.PowerfocusChip.label: Scrap Assaultron Head
LanguageData.RemoteRepairer.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to enable remote repair of RobCo robots. Insert into the Pipboy to activate advanced repair protocols.
LanguageData.RemoteRepairer.label: Pipboy Remote Repairer Holotape
LanguageData.RemoteShielder.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to project remote shields onto RobCo robots. Insert into the Pipboy to enable advanced shielding capabilities.
LanguageData.RemoteShielder.label: Pipboy Remote Shielder Holotape
LanguageData.RepairProbe.description: A holotape for the Pipboy, used to optimize repair speed for RobCo robots. Insert into the Pipboy to increase robot repair efficiency.
LanguageData.RepairProbe.label: Pipboy Repair Probe Holotape
LanguageData.RobCo_Assaultron.description: Sleek, predatory killer: fast as a shadow, eyes burning with focused death beams. The wasteland's mechanical reaper.
LanguageData.RobCo_Assaultron.label: Assaultron
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronHeadLaser.description: A compact Assaultron-pattern head laser with a faster firing cycle than heavier beam projectors. This makes it more suitable for rapid engagements and close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronHeadLaser.label: RobCo Assaultron head laser
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronSheepsquatch.description: This is a Sheepsquatch. Well, not really, but if you squint your eyes it may look like the real one.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronSheepsquatch.label: Sheepsquatch
LanguageData.RobCo_BrokenEyebotFrame.description: Broken Pieces of an Eyebot. A mechanic can study these parts to help unlock higher tiers of RobCo research.
LanguageData.RobCo_BrokenEyebotFrame.label: Broken Eyebot Frame
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_BallisticAuto.label: ballistic auto burst
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_Electroshock.label: electroshock bolt
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserAssaultron.label: RobCo Assaultron head laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserAuto.label: auto laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserHigh.label: high-beam laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserLow.label: low-beam laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserMedium.label: medium-beam laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserSheepsquatch.label: RobCo Assaultron head laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LiberatorLaser.label: liberator laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LibertyPrimeMiniNuke.label: liberty prime mini-nuke
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LibertyPrimePulse.label: liberty prime pulse
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_ScurrybotLaser.label: scurrybot laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SecuritronLaser.label: securitron laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SecuritronRocket.label: securitron rocket
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SentryRocket.label: sentry rocket
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SonicBark.label: sonic bark
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_Syringe.label: RobCo syringe
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_WarMachinePulse.label: war machine pulse
LanguageData.RobCo_BurnoutMechlinkBooster.description: Further boosts the performance of the comms console.
LanguageData.RobCo_BurnoutMechlinkBooster.label: RobCo Antenna
LanguageData.RobCo_Collectron.description: A scavenger drone, endlessly trundling after cans, junk, or "valuable resources." Programmed to hoard like a metallic raccoon.
LanguageData.RobCo_Collectron.label: Collectron
LanguageData.RobCo_CommsConsole.description: Comms console with RobCo bossgroup functionality.
LanguageData.RobCo_CommsConsole.label: RobCo Comms Console
LanguageData.RobCo_Constructron.description: Industrial-grade version, all welders and rivet guns. Once meant for building cities of old.
LanguageData.RobCo_Constructron.label: Constructron
LanguageData.RobCo_Cyberdog.description: Half hound, half machine, all loyalty. Cybernetics enhance speed, smell, and bite, but the heart remains canine.
LanguageData.RobCo_Cyberdog.label: Cyberdog
LanguageData.RobCo_CyberdogSonicBark.description: A short-range acoustic projector used by RobCo security units. It emits a concussive sonic pulse that disrupts mechanical targets without relying on direct physical damage.
LanguageData.RobCo_CyberdogSonicBark.label: sonic bark emitter
LanguageData.RobCo_Eyebot.description: A floating loudspeaker with a mind of its own, tirelessly blaring propaganda and tunes while sweeping the wastes with its mounted energy weapon.
LanguageData.RobCo_Eyebot.label: Eyebot
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotCrashed.description: This is a strange Robot, it seems to collect data and send them... somewhere.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotCrashed.label: Crashed Vertibot Robot
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotDuraframe.description: A hardened military variant of the Eyebot: thicker armor, heavier gun, and advanced comms gear.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotDuraframe.label: Eyebot Duraframe
LanguageData.RobCo_EyeOfHydra.description: This is one of many eyes of the Hydra.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyeOfHydra.label: Eye of Hydra
LanguageData.RobCo_Factotron.description: Rare factory-automation unit, built to oversee entire assembly lines with chilling efficiency. A walking production floor.
LanguageData.RobCo_Factotron.label: Factotron
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydra.description: This is the Hydra, a dangerous foe of many wasteland legends. They say when you slice off one of its eyes two more grow back.
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydra.label: Hydra
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydraArray.tools.0.label: ripper
LanguageData.RobCo_Laser_Combat.description: Integrated laser cannon mounted on a Securitron. Lethal combat weapon.
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.description: A propaganda-minded combat robot from Jiang's faction. Humanoid, aggressive, and programmed to view itself as a freedom fighter. Effective in battle despite the existential contradiction of its "liberation" protocol.
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.label: Liberator
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.description: Military-grade laser rifle integrated into a Chinese Liberator combat robot.
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.label: liberator laser rifle
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.tools.0.label: servo hands
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.description: The ultimate expression of pre-war military technology. A gargantuan humanoid war machine equipped with mini-nuke launchers and plasma cannons. Treats everything it encounters as a potential threat. Extremely rare and almost certainly one-of-a-kind.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.label: Liberty Prime
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeMiniNukeLauncher.descr: A high-energy pulse cannon integrated into Liberty Prime, leaving the mini-nuke throw to its dedicated launch system.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeMiniNukeLauncher.label: liberty prime pulse cannon
LanguageData.RobCo_MechbandDish.description: Greatly boosts the performance of the comms console.
LanguageData.RobCo_MechbandDish.label: RobCo Dish
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNanny.description: The Handy's daintier sister, fitted with programming in etiquette, childcare, and needlework. Less combat, more compassion.
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNanny.label: Miss Nanny
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNannyBlaster.tools.0.label: manipulator arm
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterFarmhand.description: Agricultural Handy variant with crop sensors, pesticide sprayers, and tireless cheer for "the simple country life."
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterFarmhand.label: Mister Farmhand
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy.description: Military-grade Handy, and merciless, with and a drill-sergeant personality.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy.label: Mister Gutsy
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsyArray.tools.0.label: ripper
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandy.description: Floating domestic butler, cheerfully armed with buzz saw, flamethrower, and endless commentary. RobCo's most iconic host.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandy.label: Mister Handy
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandyBlaster.tools.0.label: sawblade
LanguageData.RobCo_Protectron.description: The workhorse of RobCo: boxy, slow, and unnervingly polite. Equally ready to hand out library fines or lethal force.
LanguageData.RobCo_Protectron.label: Protectron
LanguageData.RobCo_Receiver.description: Boosts the performance of the comms console.
LanguageData.RobCo_Receiver.label: RobCo Receiver
LanguageData.RobCo_Robobrain.description: Human intellect entombed in steel. Their eerie, monotone logic is a reminder of what happens when war and science mix too freely.
LanguageData.RobCo_Robobrain.label: Robobrain
LanguageData.RobCo_RobobrainSyringer.description: A precision syringe gun that fires metal needles loaded with toxic compounds. It is designed to injure the target on impact and deliver poison at longer range than most sidearms.
LanguageData.RobCo_RobobrainSyringer.label: RobCo syringer
LanguageData.RobCo_ScurrybotLaser.description: Compact integrated laser mounted on a Scurrybot surveillance unit.
LanguageData.RobCo_ScurrybotLaser.label: scurrybot laser cannon
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronElectroshock.description: Upgraded laser platform integrated into a Securitron Mark II with an onboard rocket battery.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronElectroshock.label: securitron police laser
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.description: Integrated ballistic repeater mounted on a Securitron Mark I security platform.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.label: securitron ballistic repeater
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.tools.0.label: shock baton
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkI.description: A classic Securitron Mark I security robot. Equipped with an integrated laser cannon for lethal enforcement. Reliable and deadly.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkI.label: Securitron Mark I
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII.description: An improved Securitron Mark II with non-lethal electroshock capability. Preferred by law enforcement for control and containment of dangerous individuals.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII.label: Securitron Mark II
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotAnnihilator.description: For homeowners who prefer overwhelming hospitality. Its laser minigun sweeps intruders with steady suppressive beams, keeping the neighborhood impressively quiet.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotAnnihilator.label: Annihilator Sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotDeathbot.description: It's a robot, it will be your death, it's a Deathbot, no more questions.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotDeathbot.label: Deathbot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotPestcontrol.description: Your all-purpose household critter remover. It fogs the area with toxic gas and tidies up stubborn pests with a warm, cleansing burst of flame.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotPestcontrol.label: Pestcontrol Sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotSiegebreaker.description: A heavy-duty yard guardian for when "keep out" signs just aren't enough. Its breaching rockets turn raider cover, and the occasional garden shed, into decorative rubble.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotSiegebreaker.label: Siegebreaker Sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SheepsquatchHeadLaser.description: A high-output head-mounted beam projector built around a long charge cycle and a large blast radius. The discharge produces significant heat and is most effective when fired from standoff range.
LanguageData.RobCo_SheepsquatchHeadLaser.label: RobCo Assaultron head laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.description: A stripped-down Protectron model built for labor and logistics. Cheap, sturdy, and great for mining.
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.label: Utilitron
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.tools.0.label: drill
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachine.description: A colossal humanoid war engine. Can throw mini-nuke projectiles and spawn Liberators to aid in combat. Weighs several tons and packs enough firepower to level buildings. A walking WMD.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachine.label: War Machine
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineMiniNukeLauncher.descrip: A sustained pulse battery integrated into the War Machine's torso hardpoints.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineMiniNukeLauncher.label: war machine pulse battery
LanguageData.ShieldGeneratorBullets.label: RobCo bullet shield generator
LanguageData.ShieldGeneratorMortar.label: RobCo mortar shield generator
LanguageData.ShuttleCrashed_Exitable_Mechanitor.descr: The crash site of a Vertibot, possibly containing valuable robotics salvage and pre-war technology.
LanguageData.ShuttleCrashed_Exitable_Mechanitor.label: Vertibot crash site
LanguageData.ShuttleCrashing_Mechanitor.description: The crash site of a Vertibot, possibly containing valuable robotics salvage.
LanguageData.ShuttleCrashing_Mechanitor.label: Vertibot crash site
LanguageData.SignalChip.description: Still functional parts of a Mister Handy unit thruster.
LanguageData.SignalChip.label: Good As New RobCo Thrusters
LanguageData.StandardRecharger.description: Combat RobCo robots can recharge here. Produces and stores wastepacks internally.
LanguageData.StandardRecharger.label: Military-grade RobCo recharger
LanguageData.SubcoreBasic.label: Basic Circuitry
LanguageData.SubcoreEncoder.description: This terminal can be used to create RobCo AI routines.
LanguageData.SubcoreEncoder.label: RobCo AI Coding Terminal
LanguageData.SubcoreHigh.description: This is a human brain... in a jar.
LanguageData.SubcoreHigh.label: Human Brain
LanguageData.SubcoreRegular.label: Military-Grade Circuitry
LanguageData.SubcoreRipscanner.description: A General Atomics machine to carefully extract human processor units.
LanguageData.SubcoreRipscanner.label: General Atomics Brain Extractor
LanguageData.SubcoreSoftscanner.description: This machine can create AI subroutines by mimicking human brain activity.
LanguageData.SubcoreSoftscanner.label: RobCo AI Subroutine Scanner
LanguageData.UnfinishedSubcore.label: Unfinished RobCo Parts
LanguageData.UnstablePowerCell.description: A volatile RobCo power cell. Handle with extreme caution!
